programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: The Silicon Valley Revolution
programme.sub-title: How a few nerds did change the world
programme.desc: The Silicon Valley Revolution - How a few nerds did change the world - From the first Computer Trade Fair to the WWW: The dream of personal computers slowly turns into Big Business. The dream of a few leftist visionaries took over the world in the 1980s: the now legendary Macintosh goes on sale, Bill Gates creates the foundation for his economic imperium, the world wide web connects billions of people all over the world, Google is founded.

programme.title: The Human Limits
programme.desc: The Human Limits - Season 1 - Masters of the Mind: In this part, six talents prove their extraordinary abilities and show how they control their mind. There's Lukas Irmler who's slacklining in dizzying heights above the abyss, Shaolin monk Shi Yan Yao who has spent his whole life practicing meditation and can bend a steel bar with his neck and mathematical super brains Gert Mittring and Rüdiger Gramm who can solve nearly every arithmetic problem without a pocket calculator.

programme.title: Alexander The Great
programme.desc: Alexander The Great - Season 1 - The Path to Power: Part one of this stunning documentary focuses on Alexander the Great's childhood and youth. Born in Macedonia in 356 BC as a member of the Argead dynasty, he succeeded his father Philip II to the throne at the age of twenty. But the kingdom Alexander inherited was volatile.

programme.title: Alexander The Great
programme.desc: Alexander The Great - Season 1 - Until the End of the World: After the assassination of his father, the young king of Macedonia set out to conquer a massive empire. Against overwhelming odds, Alexander led his army to victories across the Persian territories of Asia Minor, Syria and Egypt finally reaching northwest India – all without suffering a single defeat.

programme.title: The Arabs
programme.desc: The Arabs have been bringing knowledge of the ancient world to Europe since the 8th century. In the fields of medicine, mathematics or philosophy, their scholars were far beyond their time and still affect our world today. For a long time the Arabs were estranged, not united by one nation or leader. They had little in common but a shared language.

programme.title: The Carthaginians
programme.desc: The Carthaginians were sly merchants and cruel child killers – at least according to the Ancient Romans and Greeks. But research shows that they weren't as bad as their reputation. The Carthaginians' story began around 3,000 years ago, when settlers left their homes in what is now Lebanon to set up new colonies around the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Desert Land of the Middle East
programme.desc: The Middle East is also home to the Red Sea, one of the saltiest seas in the world, yet despite this, over ten per cent of this sea's fish species are found nowhere else on the planet.

programme.title: Glorious Grasslands
programme.desc: Savanna, prairie, meadow: grassland goes by many names. Seas of green, dominated by one of the most successful plant species. It's so hardy and productive that it can survive flooding, drought and fires, managing to feed vast animal communities. What's more, it's not just a food source, it's also a theatre many of nature's most dramatic spectacles play out in this breathtaking wilderness. We literally need grasslands to breathe, but they're a vital resource for some of our most exciting wildlife!

programme.title: Hidden Spain
programme.desc: Spain is found at the crossroads between the Mediterranean and the Atlantic, resulting in diverse landscapes, ancient cultures and magnificent wildlife.

programme.title: Manatees on the Move
programme.desc: Manatees, sea cows, these gentle giants go by several names. They were once thought to be beautiful mermaids that could lure sailors to their deaths, though they probably won't win too many beauty contests. To retain their weight, manatees need to eat for 8 hours and consume 8% of their bodyweight every day. And keeping eating also means keeping moving! Thanks to their tolerance of human visitors, manatees have mates everywhere, working tirelessly to ensure they roam the world for generations to come.

programme.title: Kanga Pan
programme.desc: Kanga Pan: An African Horror Story is a spine-chilling, one-off wildlife documentary. Who is the killer on the loose? Who is terrorising the pan? An investigation needs to be undertaken.

programme.title: Desert Land of the Middle East
programme.desc: The Middle East is also home to the Red Sea, one of the saltiest seas in the world, yet despite this, over ten per cent of this sea's fish species are found nowhere else on the planet.

programme.title: Hidden Spain

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Spirits, Kings, Lemurs – Madagascar treats Ami to a multitude of new impressions and spectacular pictures. Director Christian Schidlowski and his team accompanied her on her trip.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Along with photographer Rui Camilo, we travel to the West African island nation of Sao Tomé and Príncipe - in search of images that will capture the soul of this small and beautiful country.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Cape Verde – the islands of Saudade, of longing. For Stéphane and Richard it was a journey full of adventure, unforgettable encounters and magnificent photographs. Director Christian Schidlowski and his team accompanied them on their trip.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The island of Martinique is a piece of France in the Caribbean, between Florida and South America. And of course, Savoir-vivre applies just as it does on the other side of the Atlantic, between the English Channel and the Mediterranean. Jacky Pascault is the first and only man to cultivate mushrooms in the Caribbean. Everywhere else, they grow on artificially fertilised soil, but Jacky's Champignons Tropicaux flourish on sugar cane fibres. Nicole Vilo tailors hats and dresses out of coconut palms. Of course, the catwalk for the models wearing her first collection is one of the countless dream beaches. The Martiniquais sail on boats they call Yole, which have no keel and are therefore difficult to navigate. The crew members hang over the water in breakneck fashion on long wooden poles. Just the job for Yole-boss Max' "problem kids": they not only learn complicated handling, but also team spirit.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.sub-title: Curacao, Blue Wonder of the Caribbean
programme.desc: Curacao is one of the most popular attractions for countless cruise ships on their trips through the Caribbean, because it is located outside of the hurricane belt. This is why Eric Miguel is constantly in action. He is the bridge keeper of the Queen Emma Bridge, the landmark of Curacao's capital, Willemstad. After his shift, Eric goes to Yvonne Troeman's cook-shop. Her speciality is Kadushi, a cactus soup. The ingredients include cactus flesh, pigtail's, mussels and a few secret "treats". Barbara van Bebber is the only submarine pilot on Curacao and literally gets to the bottom of things amidst the turquoise-blue wonder of the Caribbean. She charters out her sub to marine biologists and wealthy private explorers, simultaneously cleaning up on the seabed. Her "Curasub" has claw arms, which she employs to remove anything that doesn't belong down there: beer bottles, car tyres, and plastic refuse. Jeroen Eikelenboom simply carts sand from a neighbouring cove to his own surf club in his favourite bay.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The palm tree laden beaches on Mexico's Riviera Maya on the Yucatan peninsula are endless, and the turquoise sea with its gentle Caribbean surf is a warm 25 degrees during the mild winter in this part of the world. Between Cancún and Punta Allen, where once there was little more than bushland and a few sleepy fishing villages, vibrant life has evolved during the past three decades. Richard Sowa has lived on a floating island for the past 15 years: an island he built himself out of empty plastic bottles. The bon vivant him-self sees it as a "solution for our planet's refuse problem". Off Punta Allen, a village in the bay of Sian Ka'an, Mexican Mara Coral Ley and her cousin Kim, continue to catch lobsters by adhering to the traditional method and were awarded an "Eco seal for sustainable fishing" for their trouble. It is silent under water off Isla Mujeres and it is here that the artist Jason deCaires has constructed a sculpture park. Hundreds of lifesize figures form an artificial reef at a depth of 12 metres. Fish and plants complete his work of art. The master himself is convinced: "Mother Nature is the true artist".

programme.title: Caribbean sisters: The Lesser Antilles St. Kitts & Nevis
programme.desc: In the centre of the Caribbean, volcanoes rise steeply from the sea, thus shaping the sister islands of St. Kitts & Nevis. Their slopes, covered in lush rainforests, snow-white, sandy beaches and the surrounding tur-quoise tinted waters provide the ultimate setting for this record-breaking, albeit tiny island paradise: Both islets are the smallest of the Caribbean dwarf states and also rank among the world's ten smallest states. A hot pepper sauce, made of a creative mixture of ginger, garlic, thyme and extraordinarily hot chillies that thrive in the hot and humid climate of Nevis, is simmering on the stove of Violet and Llewellyn's house. Lemmy Pemberton digs up abandoned turtle nests with his bare hands, as he wants to be certain that all of the babies have indeed managed to make it. Members of the Turtle Group catch sea turtles in order to take their measurements and fit them with transmitters. Taxi bus-es are not only the main means of transport on St. Kitts & Nevis, they are also an artistic expression of each driver's personality. Colourfully embellished, each taxi represents island art on wheels.

programme.title: One Year in Norway's Lofoten
programme.desc: Winter means more than just the beginning of the year for the people of Lofoten: For more than a thousand years, Lofoten has been a hub for cod fishing, with seasons lasting from February to April as huge shoals migrate from the Barents Sea to these waters. During these hectic months, more than 65,000 tons of fish are brought to shore, securing the income for the whole of Lofoten for years to come. Around a quarter of the fish caught ends up on lines to dry upon racks. From a young age, the children from the fishing villages get to earn some pocket money by cutting cod tongues and selling the produce as a delicacy appreciated by the locals.

programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa run into Home Hill to say 'Eh-oh', but where 's Po? Some children help their dad to wash his car. They get very wet and soapy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberryland's one movie theatre goes out of business, Strawberry has an idea to save it: she and her friends can film a movie to show there and attract crowds back to the theatre. Alas, Pie Man has his eye on the place for a Pie Shop, and he stealthily sabotages the kids' plan.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies (juice, cookies, a cake and party hats) and makes five new friends (Orange Blossom, Angel Cake, Ginger Snap, Honey Pie Pony and Huckleberry) along the way

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends. A trip to the North Pole and a visit with Santa make this adventure truly wonderful, until a pile of melting snowballs turns Strawberry's carefully selected presents into a soggy mess. It all ends well, though, when Strawberry's friends remind her that the best gift of all is the gift of friendship.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it's supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn't going to come this year. So Strawberry Shortcake and her two friends, Orange Blossom and Ginger Snap, go in search of spring. Spring is a young girl who doesn't want to do her job until Strawberry convinces her that everyone needs Spring's help and shows her that working together can make any job fun!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony hurts her leg and must stay in bed instead of heading off for a grand adventure. A disappointed Honey proves to be a very impatient patient, that is until Strawberry Shortcake and her friends work together telling stories and singing songs to cheer Honey up and make her feel better fast!

programme.title: L.O.L House of Surprises
programme.desc: Royal Bee has a surprise for her besties, so she invites Lady Diva, Neonlicious and Swag over for the big reveal. Their favorite diner is hers now!

programme.title: L.O.L House of Surprises
programme.desc: The BFFs are hard at work, when Bee reveals another surprise: She's bought the house upstairs. / The BFFs put finishing touches on diner cleanup as party time approaches.

programme.title: L.O.L House of Surprises
programme.desc: The party's all wrapped up and so are the girls - in their sleeping bags. Tomorrow is Spooky Ooky Day, so a slumber party is a must!

programme.title: L.O.L House of Surprises
programme.desc: The diner is hopping! It's become THE place to hang! But with so many people to serve, Candylicious can't keep up!

programme.title: L.O.L House of Surprises
programme.desc: All aboard B.B. Air for New Fab City! Neonlicious and her girls are off to the big city with Fly Gurl piloting.

programme.title: L.O.L House of Surprises
programme.desc: Things get complicated when Queen Bee and Royal Bee don't communicate that their friends Sunset and City Babe are coming over at the same time.

programme.title: L.O.L House of Surprises
programme.desc: BBs all around the world are racing to win the world's biggest scavenger hunt television show!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Join Jett the jet plane on his travels around the world while he delivers packages to the children

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, along with Jett Pet, flies to Mexico to deliver costume butterfly wings to a girl awaiting the annual butterfly migration.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a pasta making machine to a boy in Pisa, Italy.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a spinning top to a boy, Kenta, in Sapporo, Japan!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jett Pet join a girl and her father to look for a lost tiger kitten's mother in the jungle of Madhya Pradesh, India - the same jungle from the girl's favourite book, "The Jungle Book".

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers some drone wings to a girl, Lea, in Geneva.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jett Pet deliver a fan letter to Trevor, a young musician and old friend of the Super Wings.

programme.title: The Mask Of Deception
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers. The ninja find themselves scattered to the four corners of the kingdom. Cole and Jay are searching in vain for some sign of Master Wu. Nya fights injustice in the north, while Kai and Zane attempt to fend off an angry lava beast in the west. This leaves Lloyd alone in Ninjago City. He rushes to the scene of a heist at Borg Tower and finds himself up against a team of highly trained operatives led by the mysterious masked MISTER-E. Lloyd fails to prevent the heist and an ancient artifact, the MASK OF DECEPTION, is stolen. Lloyd apprehends one of the criminals but the others escape. Dismayed by his failure, Lloyd calls the ninjas back to Ninjago. The friends are reunited and hope for a little rest and relaxation. These hopes are dashed with the arrival MASTER HUTCHINS, a servant of the Royal Family of Ninjago, who has been sent by the EMPEROR to request their help. A new criminal gang, SONS OF GARMADON (SOG), is attempting to acquire three ancient masks called the ONI MASKS, which are rumored to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Gray Knight
programme.desc: Using his Stone to Life magic the Cloud of Monstrox turns Clay into a living, fighting, breathing stone fighting knight. But will Clay use his forces to fight for good or for evil? Does he have a choice? The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro are able to unlock the forbidden Power Shocking Scare and unleash an attack on the village of Bravington. Knights in their new vehicles rush to the rescue and are able to defeat him with a new Combo Power. In the heat of the battle, the Cloud of Monstrox sees the stone statue of Clay and zaps him to life! Clay is now turned, and is fighting against his friends. It is impossible for them to defeat him without destroying him for good. The Cloud urges Clay on. He attacks the Fortrex in order to get to Merlok. Robin in his Black Knight Mech is trying to stop him, but to no avail. Merlok 2.0 is left undefended. At the very last moment Merlok 2.0 unleashes a blasting spell that sends Clay far far away.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad And The Tightwad
programme.desc: Clay wakes up in the poor town of Nothing Hill which literally have nothing. Will Clay remember who he is and what he is fighting for. His friends try to help him, but Jorah Tightwad and his Bots get in the way. Clay as the Gray Knight wakes up far away in a place called Nothing Hill. A poor town where they literally have nothing. They harvest dust. Jorah Tightwad though has found that there is gold underneath the town. He convinces the confused Clay to help him put pressure on the poor townsfolk to give up their lots. This is an easy job for the strong Gray Knight. The NEXO KNIGHTS finally track him down and tries to convince him about who he is. But to the Gray Knight they are still his enemies, and a giant battle ensues in order to subdue the Gray Knight. At last, only Macy is left. When she begins to recite the Knights Code, some words and their meaning are able to get through the stone hard shell of the Gray Knight and the Evil that clouded him seems to disappear. Together they are able to return the ownership of the town to the villagers.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Chased Dreamers
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau, Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Girls on Mission
programme.desc: Mia and Stephanie have to use a little horse power at the Sunshine Ranch. Things are getting mixed up on Andrea's first day on the job at Heartlake City Juicebar. Olivia tapes a science show, with a little help from Mia's lemonade stand - and special effects! Andrea relaxes at the beach while Emma is hard at work at her lifeguard tower. Stephanie has to face her fears when the class gets an 'Animal Kingdom & 'school assignment.'Emma and Stephanie accidentally rent a scary movie and suddenly there are beasts everywhere...

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

programme.title: The Hatching
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated. But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

programme.title: A Time Of Traitors
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity. Meanwhile, as the Vermillion Warriors go on a kidnapping spree, Lloyd struggles with his role as master-in-training and Nya does her best to reboot Zane, who was knocked off line in his first battle with the Vermillion.

programme.title: The Mask Of Deception
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers. The ninja find themselves scattered to the four corners of the kingdom. Cole and Jay are searching in vain for some sign of Master Wu. A new criminal gang, SONS OF GARMADON (SOG), is attempting to acquire three ancient masks called the ONI MASKS, which are rumored to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Ratchet thinks back on the time that he spent in the Autobot-Decepticon War.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With Optimus damaged and temporarily out of commission, the newly-arrived Jetfire takes command.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: On the moon, Thrust continues his plotting with Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The massive Tidalwave joins the Decepticons, but is, seemingly, defeated in battle by Hot Shot and Blurr.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots question Optimus' leadership abilities.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: While Optimus struggles to survive after Megatron's destruction of the Autobot base.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots search for signs of each other, but start to lose hope.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Ultimate Autobot Hunter is unleashed on our heroes.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: It's Decepticon versus Decepticon when triple changers Astrotrain and Blitzwing decide to seize power.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An S.O.S. seeking help from the Autobots arrives from the desperate people of the planet Traal.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Hoist accidentally lands himself a role in a big Hollywood movie.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: The Key to Vector Sigma, Part 1
programme.desc: Megatron creates a powerful strike team, but his Stunticons lack sentience and independent thought.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: The Key to Vector Sigma, Part 2
programme.desc: The Autobots create the Aerialbots to join in the battle against Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Robots are truly in disguise when the Autobots pose as Stunticons to uncover Megatron's latest plan.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Born Rotten: As the Smurfs prepare for the Festival of the Stars, Gargamel plants a creature in their midst that smells so rotten that he can easily be traced to the Smurf village. Papa Smurf realizes that Born Rotten is from another planet, and he instructs Feathers to return him to his home before Gargamel finds them.

programme.title: Speak For Yourself, Farmer Smurf
programme.desc: Farmer hides his love for Smurfette by assuming a disguise and sending her poems. When they finally meet, they are captured by Bigmouth and in their struggle to get free, they discover their mutual friendship.

programme.title: The Trojan Smurf
programme.desc: Gargamel, the evil wizard, has devised a new plan to capture the Smurfs: he builds a giant statue in the shape of Papa Smurf. Thus, he hopes, the Smurfs are going to drag the statue into their Village.

programme.title: The Littlest Witch
programme.desc: On an errand to Witch Haven for Papa Smurf, the little blue creatures meet a tiny witch and teach her how to be good while at the same time cause another witch to lose her wicked powers for one year after she falls into the river.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - One Good Smurf Deserves Another: Handy Smurf has saved Clumsy from a horrible fate. Clumsy swears eternal devotion to his savior and does his best to repay his debt… With awkward results. A clever scheme is needed to stop Clumsy's well-meant catastrophes...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Miracle Smurfer: The Smurfs learn that the mind is more powerful than matter when they are fooled by a quack's outrageously expensive miracle tonic. But Papa Smurf cures the Smurfs of their temporary naiveté and the charlatan of his villainy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Adventures Of Robin Smurf: The Smurfs' theatrical production of 'Robin Smurf' comes to life as the legendary hero is portrayed by a really good actor...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Viking: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurf The Other Cheek: Hefty Smurf meets an old Trolless in the forest, and the old crone begs him to relieve her of a red spot on her nose by... giving her a good kick here and now! Hefty half-heartedly obliges... And the result is a big surprise for him!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Put Upon Puppy: Life in the Smurf Village might be more peaceful if Puppy's behavior were a little more considerate. But the little Smurf dog is digging up Smurfette's flowers, dirtying Vanity's new wallpaper or ruining Papa Smurf's experiments. Yet Puppy's going to help the Smurfs out of a trap contrived by Gargamel... Or maybe he won't be disciplined enough...

programme.title: The Magic Stick
programme.desc: With a borrowed recipe from Homnibus, Papa Smurf creates a magic stick that Clumsy takes and loses in the woods. Soon after, Bigmouth comes for a visit and before he eats all the smurfberries, Papa Smurf finds the magic stick and whisks the giant away.

programme.title: The Smurfs And The Money Tree
programme.desc: The wicked wizard Gargamel has come up with yet another diabolical plan with the help of his mother, who isn't much nicer than him. He wants to tempt the Smurfs with money of which they have no notion. Will Greedy take the bait?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette For A Day: Hefty dresses like Smurfette to lure an enamored gnome, Piltkin, away from the Smurf Village. They burrow underground and meet a female gnome who falls in love with Piltkin who then casts Smurfette aside for his new heartthrob.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Once In A Blue Moon: Once in a blue moon, as the legend goes, a baby Smurf is delivered to the Smurfs and everyone in the village becomes attached to the new arrival. But a mistake has been made and the stork returns to take the baby back. Grouchy and Smurfette have become so attached to the baby that the baby is returned.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Kow-Tow, We Won't Bow: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Dark-Ness Monster: When Brainy loses his glasses, he drops things, runs into objects, and becomes just as helpless as Clumsy, who now has to read to Brainy and help him get around. This experience makes Brainy feel guilty for the way he always made fun of Clumsy. He treats him with more respect once he receives a new pair of glasses.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Born Rotten: As the Smurfs prepare for the Festival of the Stars, Gargamel plants a creature in their midst that smells so rotten that he can easily be traced to the Smurf village. Papa Smurf realizes that Born Rotten is from another planet, and he instructs Feathers to return him to his home before Gargamel finds them.

programme.title: Brainy Smurf, Friend To All Animals
programme.desc: Brainy dons his safari hat and roams the forest to do good deeds for animals. He mostly gives advice to the creatures but balks when he can really save the life of a wildcat being hunted by Gargamel. Nat gives Brainy the courage to free the cat from Gargamel's trap.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Calling Dr Smurf: As his name implies, Dabbler Smurf is incapable of staying put in any one activity. He goes from one pursuit to another with the greatest of ease and never finishes what he's begun. But suddenly here he is smitten by the love of the medical profession. Dabbler wants to become a doctor and all of the Smurfs, with Papa Smurf in the lead, are going to help him to achieve his wish.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Locomotive Smurfs: Handy Smurf has hit on a revolutionary new idea: a sort of smurfless carriage that moves on railroad tracks. He calls it a railsmurfer and it makes for less work in the Village... until Gargamel chances upon it.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - All Hallowseve: While out on a mischief-making mission to destroy the Smurfs' Happy Halloween party, Gargamel and Hogatha catch Lazy who has been accidentally turned red by Mother Nature. Papa and the Smurfs help Lazy escape while Mother Nature has Father Time help turn Lazy's red into blue just in time for the Halloween party.

programme.title: Smile, Rabbids!
programme.desc: When a family tries to take a nice picture at a wedding ceremony, the Rabbids ruin everything.

programme.title: The Rabbids are having fun!
programme.desc: The Rabbids find a cellphone on the sidewalk. They're fascinated by the ring tone.

programme.title: The Rabbids are locked up!
programme.desc: The Rabbids are shut inside a supermarket after closing hours.

programme.title: The Rabbids are escaping!
programme.desc: John the scientist is trapped inside a rabbid's body, and gets thrown into the junkyard.

programme.title: The Rabbids aim for the moon!
programme.desc: The only way for rabbids to get into their rocket to reach the moon is to go on a drastic diet!

programme.title: Super Rabbids to the rescue
programme.desc: Beware ! The three rabbids with super powers have the worst plan to get to the moon!

programme.title: Rabbids at your service!
programme.desc: A rabbid gets ejected from his rocket as it crashes, and takes the place of a guide dog.

programme.title: The Rabbids are in the Moon
programme.desc: A sculptor inadvertently compresses the rabbids' rocket ship.

programme.title: The Rabbids are crashing
programme.desc: A baby inadvertently gets swapped with a rabbid at the babysitter's expense.

programme.title: The Rabbids go to the Moon.
programme.desc: To fight against boredom, the rabbids launch a competition of strange noises.

programme.title: The Rabbids have a great plan.
programme.desc: Four rabbids find a wooden horse and tries to make it move by all means, while drawing Zak's attention.

programme.title: The Rabbids are fed up!
programme.desc: Amazed by a dog scratching himself, the Rabbids approach him, and get the dog's fleas.

programme.title: The Rabbids are doing something stupid.
programme.desc: A Rabbid walks down the street when he steps on some chewing gum.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules! Followed by Dance of the Seven Pies.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 'Fish Tale'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: With one backstage pass for a Ratbucket gig, Dennis and his friends pass themselves off as Ratbucket, only for the real Ratbucket not to be able to play at his own concert. Followed by 60 second Dennis and 'Bad Dad'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his "brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer" to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver).

programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Sonic is almost sucked inside the Void, he finds a huge Ring which Sally believes is an ancient relic but it turns out to be trick of the Sorcerer, Nagus. Sally and Bunnie are drawn inside the Void and when Sonic comes to rescue them.

programme.sub-title: Blast to the Past Part II

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik launches a spy-orb that will uncover the Freedom Fighter's Knothole location, Sonic and Robot launch themselves up to the orbiting spy-sphere aboard a home-made rocket powered by Robotnik's discarded booster engine.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.desc: Mr Bean gets green eyes and green fingers.

programme.desc: Mr Bean meets a soul mate.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean attempts to make his own home movie – a horror thriller with Mrs. Wicket as the star!

programme.title: Fish Sitting
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to look after Mrs. Wicket's goldfish.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean wins two tickets for an exotic cruise and takes Teddy along for the trip of a lifetime.

programme.title: Coconut Shy
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to buy a cup for Teddy, but he has no money.

programme.title: Green Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean's electricity is cut off so he decides to build a wind turbine.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to buy a cupcake, but his wallet is empty, so he has to visit a cash dispenser.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to deal with an unwanted house guest but the stubborn rat refuses to leave.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean tries to be romantic, but his idea of what that means is different to Irma's.

programme.desc: Every time Bean goes to collect the newspaper from the letterbox, it disappears.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to read his book but gets interrupted by too much noise.

programme.desc: Fascinated by the super spy show, Mr. Bean decides to become a super spy himself. When he becomes suspicious of the Bruisers planning something, he starts to follow them. Later, he notices that the Bruisers are putting an old lady into a van.

programme.desc: When there's no milk for his tea and for Teddy, Mr. Bean goes to buy some.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean is in the library to draw the family tree of kings.

programme.desc: The mystery driver of the Reliant Supervan becomes obsessed with revenge.

programme.title: Wedding Day
programme.desc: A wedding car crashes, resulting in Bean coming to the rescue and offering the bride a lift.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean has some unexpected guests who think he runs a hotel!

programme.title: Jurassic Bean
programme.desc: While Mr. Bean is taking photos of wildlife, he sees big footprints belonging to a dinosaur.

programme.title: Cecil
programme.desc: Cecil's name reveals his lisp so he changes it to “Michael Jordan.” His school learns a lesson about acceptance after he and his friends start a business that sells celebrity names to kids.

programme.title: Rabbit Academy
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit meets Monsters University in the exciting, animated feature Rabbit Academy. This vibrant and colourful family adventure follows Max, the first city rabbit to be chosen in the master class for Easter Rabbits.

programme.title: MVP II: Most Vertical Primate
programme.desc: After being booted from his hockey team, Jack hits the road and meets Ben, a skateboarder with big dreams. Turns out Jack also has some impressive skater skills and the two set out on an hilarious cross-country skate tour!

programme.title: Lassie: A New Adventure
programme.desc: The most famous dog in cinema history returns in a thrilling new family adventure!

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia
programme.desc: Barbie's youngest sister Chelsea is entered into a local bike race by her friend, she is embarrassed about not being able to ride without training wheels. Inspired by Barbie's stories, Chelsea finds herself transported to the magical world of Dreamtopia, where her imagination runs wild.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: The Voices
programme.desc: Jerry is a chipper guy working at a local bathtub factory. With the help of his psychiatrist, he pursues his office crush. However, the relationship takes a murderous turn after she stands him up for a date.

programme.title: Crash Pad
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic (Domhnall Gleeson) thinks he's found true love with an older woman (Christina Applegate) only to learn that she's married and their encounter was merely an instrument of revenge against her neglectful husband (Thomas Haden Church). Initially out for blood...

programme.title: The Good Sister
programme.desc: A man begins a passionate affair with his wife's long-lost twin sister. Starring Sonya Walger (2014)

programme.title: Circle Of Friends
programme.desc: (2006) Thriller with Julie Benz. A woman returns to her home town for a funeral and reunites with her childhood friends, only to discover a shocking secret about the town that could tear them apart.)

programme.title: Sniper Elite
programme.desc: A squad of elite human soldiers faces down a powerful and deadly extraterrestrial army. Starring Kevin Sorbo (2014)

programme.title: Hijacked
programme.desc: An FBI agent on a flight to Washington DC , finds herself caught up in a brutal hijacking. Stars Dolph Lundgren and Denise Richards (2017)

programme.title: Eye For An Eye
programme.desc: A private investigator becomes involved in the disappearance of a woman from a psychiatric hospital, and uncovers a widespread web of corruption. Stars John Travolta, Morgan Freeman (2019)

programme.title: Out of Time
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this spell-binding thriller that co-stars Eva Mendes, Sanaa Lathan and Dean Cain. In a small Florida town bordered by azure seas and sultry secrets, Chief of Police Matt Whitlock (Washington) finds himself caught in the eye of a storm.

programme.title: Be Cool
programme.desc: John Travolta is back as Mafia loan shark turned Hollywood Producer Chili Palmer in this sharp sequel to "Get Shorty." With an unbelievably hip all-star cast that also includes Uma Thurman, André 3000, Steve Tyler, Christina Milian and The Rock, and bursting with the hottest music in the biz.

programme.title: The People Vs. Larry Flynt
programme.desc: A porn magnate becomes an unlikely hero when he takes his struggle against the radical religious right all the way to the Supreme Court.

programme.title: Kill 'Em All
programme.desc: After a massive shootout, a mysterious stranger (Van Damme) arrives at a local hospital on the brink of death. Then, a foreign gang brazenly comes to the hospital to hunt him down.

programme.title: The Drifters
programme.desc: THE DRIFTERS is a love story about identity and place in a post-Brexit United Kingdom. Kofi, an African migrant, and Fanny, a French waitress, are two lost souls who attempt to find home in one another and escape the labels that inevitably leave them homeless.

programme.title: Whipped
programme.desc: In The New York, Brad, Zeke and Jonathan are free and single young men about town …. and best friends. Meeting up each week, together with their married friend Eric, they recount tales of their most recent dating exploits and sexual encounters. However, when each one of them discloses to the others that he has met the perfect girlfriend things begin to get complicated.

programme.title: If You Meet Sartana Pray for Your Death
High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: The Ninth Gate
programme.desc: A rare book dealer, while seeking out the last two copies of a demon text, gets drawn into a conspiracy with supernatural overtones. Starring: Johnny Depp, Frank Langella, Lena Olin

programme.title: The Eye
programme.desc: A blind girl receives a cornea transplant so that she is able to see again. However, she gets more than she bargains for when she realizes she can see disturbing ghosts.

programme.title: The Grudge
programme.desc: A nurse is exposed to a supernatural curse, one that locks a person in a powerful rage before killing them.

programme.title: The Grudge 2
programme.desc: In Tokyo, the sister of a girl previously killed by an evil curse must learn how to stop it once and for all.

programme.title: Horns
programme.desc: After his girlfriend's mysterious death, a young man awakens to find strange horns sprouting from his forehead

programme.title: The Grudge
programme.desc: A nurse is exposed to a supernatural curse, one that locks a person in a powerful rage before killing them.

programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history. Based on the novel by the author of War Horse, Waiting for Anya follows the story of Jo Lalande, a thirteen-year-old shepherd living in the mountain village of Lescun. Though Europe may be ravaged by the horrors of World War II, Jo's world in the French Pyrenees has remained remarkably untouched. That is, until a ferocious encounter with a bear introduces Jo to the mysterious Benjamin, a Jewish refugee who is desperately awaiting the arrival of his missing daughter, Anya, before making his escape across the border. Making friends with Benjamin and his mother-in-law Horcada, an isolated widow who lives in the nearby mountains, Jo becomes aware of a very dangerous secret - the family are involved in smuggling Jewish children over the mountains to the safety of Spain. In a heroic act of defiance, Jo promises to assist Benjamin in his endeavours...but soon becomes embroiled in a perilous conspiracy when German troops make their descent upon the village. Filmed in the village of Lescun and the surrounding Aspe Valley, France in which the true to life story also originated, the film boasts an all-stellar cast including Noah Schnapp (Stranger Things), Academy Award Winner Anjelica Huston (Ever After, The Addams Family), Jean Reno (Leon, The Big Blue, Ronin), Frederick Schmidt (Mission: Impossible - Fallout), Thomas Kretschmann (The Pianist, Central Intelligence) and Nicholas Rowe (Riviera, Lock Stock and Two Smoking Barrels).

programme.title: It Follows
programme.desc: For 19-year-old Jay (Maika Monroe), the fall should be about school, boys and weekends out at the lake. But after a seemingly innocent sexual encounter, she finds herself plagued by strange visions and the inescapable sense that someone, or something, is following her. Faced with this burden, Jay and her teenage friends must find a way to escape the horrors that seem to be only a few steps behind.

programme.title: Let Me In
programme.desc: A haunting and provocative thriller written and directed by Matt Reeves (Cloverfield), based on the best-selling Swedish novel (Let the Right One In). Chlo Grace Moretz (Hit Girl in Kick-Ass) stars as Abby, a mysterious girl who moves next door to Owen (Kodi Smit-McPhee, The Road), a social outcast who is viciously bullied at school. In his loneliness, Owen forms a profound bond with Abby, but as a string of grisly murders grips his wintry New Mexico town, he begins to realise that Abby is anything but 'the girl next-door'.

programme.title: Take Shelter
programme.desc: Plagued by a series of apocalyptic visions, a young husband and father questions whether to shelter his family from a coming storm, or from himself.

programme.title: All I See Is You
programme.desc: Directed by Marc Forster (World War Z) and described by The Guardian as "Intoxicating". Gina (Blake Lively) is blind and exclusively depends on her husband James (Jason Clarke) to see the world around her. While the two enjoy a colourful existence, their relationship is upended when Gina regains her sight and begins to experience the world with a brand new sense of wonder and independence.

programme.title: Bad Samaritan
programme.desc: David Tennant (Doctor Who) and Robert Sheehan (Misfits) star in this dark, twisty mind games thriller. Struggling artist Sean who has a sideline in burglary, hits the jackpot when he breaks into the luxurious home of the wealthy Cale. But when Sean discovers a woman chained up in the house, he is soon dangerously embroiled in a vicious game of cat and mouse with a merciless psychopath.

programme.title: Beyond Suspicion
programme.desc: Ready to right some old wrongs in this edge-of-your-seat revenge thriller. When a drug bust goes wrong, notorious ex-cop Danny Gallagher's (Karl Urban: The Lord of the Rings) quest for justice leads him to the car-bomb murder of a government official's wife. Discovering the woman's secret lover was a seductive federal agent (Sofia Vergara: Modern Family), he finds himself under fire. But from who?

programme.title: Pledge
programme.desc: Spiked with twisted humour and gruesome shocks. When invited to join an elite fraternity, three freshmen social misfits want to improve their reputations. Soon, they are unexpectedly recruited by a shadowy social club offering them raging parties and VIP social status. The catch? A sadistic initiation ritual that goes from depraved to deadly over the course of 48 booze and blood-soaked hours.

programme.title: Feedback
programme.desc: Starring Eddie Marsan (This is England), Paul Anderson (Peaky Blinders) and Ivana Baquero (Pans Labyrinth) and from the creators of Rec. Black Mirror meets Die Hard. Jarvis is a star journalist of a successful London late night radio show. One evening, two armed men burst in and take control. Their mission: to shed light on a scandal that could spell the end of Jarvis' established career.

programme.title: A Vineyard Romance
programme.desc: Samantha returns to her hometown to write an article about a wedding hotspot. But her assignment is complicated when she discovers that her ex is about to get married at the venue. (2021)

programme.title: Her Pen Pal
programme.desc: Victoria is in Paris for friend's wedding, but she needs a date to make her ex believe she's over him, will Jacques her childhood French pen pal assist her in this ruse? (2021)

programme.title: Sweet Home Carolina
programme.desc: Diane is a struggling single mom in LA. Just when things are at there worst, she inherits a house, but she will have to live in small town USA and take care of a dog.

programme.title: Sailing Into Love
programme.desc: Biology teacher Claire is set to be a bridesmaid at three weddings, but will her biggest challenge come in the form of her ex-boyfriend, who is developing a resort on an unspoilt island? (2019)

programme.title: A Vineyard Romance
programme.desc: Samantha returns to her hometown to write an article about a wedding hotspot. But her assignment is complicated when she discovers that her ex is about to get married at the venue. (2021)

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's brilliant at organizing other people's engagements, but unlucky in finding romance herself. When designing her most important proposal yet, the man who could jeopardize it all may be the one who helps find her own love story.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature.

programme.title: Destination Wedding
programme.desc: Forced to tolerate each other for a few days, two cynical wedding guests strike an unexpected alliance.

programme.title: Say When
programme.desc: Megan (Keira Knightley) panics when her boyfriend proposes and hides out in the home of her new teenage friend Annika (Chloë Grace Moretz).

programme.title: Love After Love
programme.desc: An uplifting story of love after loss. Following the death of a college professor, a wife and son explore new beginnings.

programme.title: Save The Wedding
programme.desc: Meg and Tyler have never gotten along with each other but when they work together to save the best friends' wedding, they discover they actually make a good team and begin a little romance of their own.

programme.title: Bridal Boot Camp
programme.desc: Andy Phillips is preparing for her upcoming wedding with her fiancé, Jordan. However, after chatting with her best friend, Andy starts to question if she has what it takes to make a strong a lasting marriage.

programme.title: A Good Woman
programme.desc: The seductive Mrs. Erlynne (Helen Hunt) travels to Amalfi, Italy, hoping to win over married aristocrat Robert Windermere. But when Windermere's innocent wife Meg (Scarlett Johansson) hears of the scandal, she plots an elaborate revenge.

programme.title: A Christmas to Savour
programme.desc: Scarlett is a chef but every year her holiday dishes never sell. So this year, her best friend buys her a ticket for a holiday...maybe she will find love in a handsome rival chef from her past, and regain the Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Lost in Love
programme.desc: Two tourists in Turkey get left behind by their tour bus after visiting an archaeological site. Without their belongings, they must make their way back to Istanbul, improvising along the way with meager means.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: Passionate fashion stylist Rose is in her 30s and living in New York. When she inherits her grandmother's vintage dress shop, she returns to her small hometown to take care of the store and bumps into her high school crush Cole.

programme.title: Follow Your Heart
programme.desc: When an eight year old girl loses her mother to cancer, her mother's last wish is for her to fall in love and find that special magical person. Twenty years later, she is alone, fired, and broke. When she and a friend decide to relocate to LA to start anew, she becomes attracted to their bus driver.

programme.title: Prescription For Love
programme.desc: Claire, a nurse, fights for a chance at love with a charming new doctor and for a promotion to free herself from the misery her supervisor creates. As her supervisor tries to derail Claire's chance at happiness, Claire will have to stand up for herself and go after her dreams.

programme.title: Ruling of the Heart
programme.desc: Judge Morgan has become known for his no-nonsense toughness in court. He rules fast and he rules hard, barely noticing the person on the other end of his decisions. When he gets stuck in a cafe during a snowstorm, he is surprised to discover two of the other customers stranded with him happen to be people recently in his court, with verdicts handed down that have made him very unpopular. As the night unfolds in the small cafe, unexpected truth emerges from both sides that changes everything.

programme.title: The Wrong Neighbor
programme.desc: Dad & teen daughter stalked by crazy neighbor. Stars Michael Madsen, Andrea Bo.

programme.title: The Wrong Stepfather
programme.desc: Principal Ellen thinks friend Karen's swift engagement to Craig Green is odd.

programme.title: Betrayed by a Lover
programme.desc: Christine Carter's 7-year perfect marriage ended with Nicholas Francisco's exit.

programme.title: The Wrong House
programme.desc: Rebecca and Brian leave New York for a LA house with a secret past.

programme.title: The Wrong Neighbor
programme.desc: Dad & teen daughter stalked by crazy neighbor. Stars Michael Madsen, Andrea Bo.

programme.title: A Man for Every Month
programme.desc: Blogger, Megan, tends to shy away from dating, but that all changes when her boss assigns her to vlog her dates for the eligible bachelor calendar. Now pushed out of her comfort zone, Megan must quickly learn the golden rules of dating.

programme.title: The Joneses Unplugged
programme.desc: With their relationship under strain, a young couple decides to ditch the distractions of technology in order to reconnect to one another.

programme.title: Advance and Retreat
programme.desc: An ambitious junior executive is reunited with her first love at a corporate retreat, ultimately realizing that she might have to take a step back to make a leap forward.

programme.title: Our Dream Wedding
programme.desc: Haley, staunchly anti-marriage, tries on her grandma's magical veil and sees her future with boyfriend Scott.

programme.title: Stripes (1981)
programme.desc: STRIPES is a hilarious film with Bill Murray as an irresponsible goof-off who has just lost his job, his girl, his apartment and his car. As he ponders his fate, it occurs to him that enlisting in the Army seems to be a sensible career move. He persuades his friend to join him and soon they find themselves in boot camp surrounded by misfits.

programme.title: Stripes (1981)
programme.desc: STRIPES is a hilarious film with Bill Murray as an irresponsible goof-off who has just lost his job, his girl, his apartment and his car. As he ponders his fate, it occurs to him that enlisting in the Army seems to be a sensible career move. He persuades his friend to join him and soon they find themselves in boot camp surrounded by misfits.

programme.title: Punch-drunk Love
programme.desc: Barry Egan (Adam Sandler), the owner of a struggling vanity plungers company, falls in love with Lena Leonard (Emily Watson), a woman his sister is trying to set him up with. On the run from a gang of thugs, Barry travels to Hawaii, using the frequent flier mile coupons clipped from several cartons of pudding cups, to meet up with this girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Multiplicity
programme.desc: An overextended dad, husband and businessman becomes the ultimate split personality by having himself cloned.

programme.title: The Plunderers
programme.desc: Cavalry officer John Drum attempts to track down outlaw Whit Lacey, but finds he must join forces with Lacey to fight a Sioux war party.

programme.title: Wyatt Earp S01E25-28
programme.desc: In one of television's first adult Westerns, the famous marshal puts his life on the line to maintain order, first in Dodge City, Kan., then in Tombstone, Ariz.

programme.title: Patience Has a Limit, We Don't
programme.desc: During the Civil War, Corporal MacDonald hides a large gold shipment meant for the Union. Before he can retrieve it, he's killed—taking the secret location with him. Now, a Union lieutenant and MacDonald's two sons compete to uncover the buried treasure in a tense hunt filled with danger and deception.

programme.title: The Cry of the Black Wolves
programme.desc: Halfwit Indian Akaena promises a fictitious treasure to anyone who takes her down south where the sun always shines.

programme.title: Boot Hill Bandits
programme.desc: Shady town businessman Bolton seems to be the leader of the gang but even he takes his order from a higher authority who may have tried to take Marshal Corrigan's life.

programme.title: The Spider and the Fly
programme.desc: Just before the First World War, a safe-cracking thief is baffling the Paris police.

programme.title: Death at Broadcasting House
programme.desc: When actor Sidney Parsons is murdered while taking part in a radio broadcast play, Detective-Inspector Gregory is called in to investigate and is quick to discover that the victim had many enemies amongst his fellow players in the cast. When his deductions lead him into a blind alley he decides to reconstruct the crime in the hope that this well-tried device will lead him to the killer. All the technical and human resources of Broadcasting House are brought to his aid.

programme.title: Crooks Anonymous
programme.desc: Captain Dandy Forsdyke, phoney man-about-town and flourishing jewel thief, drives his girlfriend mad. Dandy cannot prevent himself from lifting such tempting objects as stray diamond rings and bulging wallets which are not at that moment being used.

programme.title: Crooks in Cloisters
programme.desc: A gang of hardboiled rogues exchange their London gear for the rough brown robes of a religious order. Make no mistake, they are not undergoing a change of heart, just hiding out until the heat cools off a little and they can return to their nefarious activities in the big city!

programme.title: Paradise Hills
programme.desc: A young woman named Uma (Emma Roberts) wakes one morning in Paradise Hills, where well-off families send their daughters to become the perfect version of themselves. But behind all this "perfection" lies a sinister secret. Milla Jovovich also stars.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: In the future, a man with access to people's memories finds his life at risk when he discovers a dark secret.

programme.title: Automata
programme.desc: Fast forward fifty years into the future, planet earth is in the midst of gradual desertification. Mankind struggles to survive as the environment deteriorates and the slow regression of the human race begins in AUTÓMATA.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: Young couple Gemma and Tom find themselves trapped in a surreal suburban neighborhood, where each road leads them back to where they began.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Deadly Deed
programme.desc: When a banker is found dead in a Victorian mansion, Shannon Hughes finds herself within another murder case. Starring Jewel (2018)

programme.title: Martha's Vineyard: Riddled With Deceit
programme.desc: (2020) Thriller with Jesse Metcalfe. A missing family heirloom is the key to finding the truth as former detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr Zee Madieras to track down a murderer.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: Stuntman by day, getaway driver by night, the mysterious Driver must put his skills to the test when he chooses to help his neighbour and her shady husband. Stars Ryan Gosling (2011)

programme.title: Dragon Eyes
programme.desc: (2012) Gritty action starring Cung Le and Jean-Claude Van Damme. Can a mysterious newcomer use his moral vision and fighting skills to save a neighbourhood terrorised by gangs and corrupt cops?

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: (2024) Crime drama with Katherine McNamara. After her brother is convicted of murder, a law student sets out to prove his innocence. But the closer she gets to the truth, the more danger she's in...

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.sub-title: A Death for Love, More Deaths from Greed
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.sub-title: The Bravest Tiger is First Killed
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: Alpha (2018)
programme.desc: Alpha is an epic adventure set in the last Ice Age. While on his first hunt with his tribe's most elite group, a young man is injured and left for dead. Awakening to find himself broken and alone, he must learn to survive and navigate the harsh and unforgiving wilderness.

programme.title: Alpha (2018)
programme.desc: Alpha is an epic adventure set in the last Ice Age. While on his first hunt with his tribe's most elite group, a young man is injured and left for dead. Awakening to find himself broken and alone, he must learn to survive and navigate the harsh and unforgiving wilderness.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Vita & Virginia
programme.desc: It's the fascinating true story about the love affair between socialite and popular author Vita Sackville-West and literary icon Virginia Woolf, and the love story that inspired Virginia Woolf's Orlando. Starring Gemma Arterton, Elizabeth Debicki and Isabella Rossellini.

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: John lives with his partner, Eric, and their daughter, Mónica in California, far from the traditional rural life he left behind years ago.

programme.title: Stonewall
programme.desc: As Danny and his friends experience discrimination, endure atrocities and are repeatedly harassed by the police, we see a rage begin to build.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: Director Simon West and Nicolas Cage team-up for the first time since the 1997 blockbuster CON AIR for STOLEN, a unique fast paced action thriller that takes place during 10 frantic hours on Mardi Gras day in New Orleans.

programme.title: Sniper
programme.desc: While working with the UN Forces in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Marine Sgt. Brandon Beckett (Chad Michael Collins), son of renowned sniper Thomas Beckett, receives orders to rescue a European farmer trapped in the middle of hostile rebel territory.

programme.title: Sniper
programme.desc: Brandon Beckett informed his father, legendary shooter Thomas Beckett has been killed. Brandon springs into action to take out the perpetrator...

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: A deadly virus is unleashed that threatens to overrun the Earth.
